ManufacturingSteps: • Customer inquiry review (drawing PDF, quantity, material, surface, delivery deadline)
• Work preparation: verify drawing completeness, manufacturability, critical dimensions, and material
• Laser cutting from sheet stock (typical accuracy ±0.1 mm)
• Deburring sharp edges (grinding, brushing, or tumbling)
• Bending / edge forming on press brake when angles are required
• Surface treatment per customer requirement (galvanizing, powder coating, painting, anodizing)
• Quality inspection (length, angles, hole spacing, material thickness)
